text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for letting me rest! Because of that, I
was able to get a good night's sleep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! How about you? Did you get a good
rest? If not, I've got a recommendation that'll
help you doze off and grant you a pleasant sleep!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: My textbook! I'll lend it to you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Life isn't just about preparing and reviewing for
tests. Sleep is also important. Our textbook is so
versatile! That's why it's the model student's
sacred text!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Sakura Bakushin O had a good rest
on her day off.
